reference: Hi, my name is Ana. I have been looking for help, and I need to understand my MRI result because the doctor did not explain it to me. The findings are as follows: there is a curvature of the cervical spine convex toward the right on the coronal image. Straightening of the upper cervical lordosis is present, consistent with musculoskeletal strain.
